title: narcissus linnaeanus var. xantheus
intro: Narcissus linnaeanus var. xantheus, also known as the yellow-flowered narcissus, is a variant of the narcissus plant characterized by its bright yellow flowers and is often used in herbal medicine. The plant is believed to possess medicinal properties such as anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can be used to treat a range of health issues including respiratory problems and skin conditions. The health benefits of using Narcissus linnaeanus var. xantheus include its ability to ease congestion, reduce fever, and promote healing, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing its flowers in water or oil, and it can also be used in tincture or salve form to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
